description: Connect to remote SFTP servers to upload, download, and manage files and directories.

methods.name: createConnection
methods.description: Establishes a connection to a remote FTP server and returns a Connection object.

params.name: options.username
params.description: The username of the remote account

params.name: options.keyId
params.description: The script ID of the secret key (from Setup > Company > Keys)

params.name: options.url
params.description: The host of the remote account

params.name: options.directory
params.description: The remote directory to navigate to after connecting

params.name: options.hostKey
params.description: The host key for the remote server

params.name: options.passwordGuid
params.description: GUID of a stored password credential

enums.name: MAX_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
enums.description: Holds the value for maximum connection timeout (20 seconds).

enums.name: MIN_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
enums.description: Holds the value for minimum connection timeout (1 second).

enums.name: MAX_PORT_NUMBER
enums.description: Holds the value for the maximum port number (65535).

enums.name: MIN_PORT_NUMBER
enums.description: Holds the value for the minimum port number (0).

enums.name: DEFAULT_PORT_NUMBER
enums.description: Holds the value for the default port number (22).

enums.name: Sort
enums.description: Values for sorting directory listings. Use for the options.sort parameter of Connection.list(options).

objectTypes.name: Connection
objectTypes.description: Represents a connection to a remote FTP server.

methods.name: download
methods.description: Downloads a file from the remote FTP server and returns a file.File object.

params.name: options.filename
params.description: Name of the file to download

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Uploads a file to the remote FTP server.

params.name: options.filename
params.description: Filename to use on the remote server

params.name: options.replaceExisting
params.description: Whether to replace an existing file

methods.name: makeDirectory
methods.description: Creates an empty directory on the remote server.

params.name: options.path
params.description: Path of the directory to create

methods.name: removeDirectory
methods.description: Removes an empty directory on the remote server.

params.name: options.path
params.description: Path of the directory to remove

methods.name: removeFile
methods.description: Removes a file on the remote server.

params.name: options.path
params.description: Path of the file to remove

methods.name: move
methods.description: Moves a file or directory from one location to another on the remote server.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists files and directories in a remote directory.

params.name: options.path
params.description: Path of the directory to list

properties.name: MAX_FILE_SIZE
properties.description: Holds the value for the maximum file size (100000000 bytes).

properties.name: MAX_TRANSFER_TIMEOUT
properties.description: Holds the value for the maximum transfer timeout (300 seconds).
